     The Numbers Business Report

The Unbearable Weight of Massive Talent (2022)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $20,300,157Details
International Box Office $8,816,163
Worldwide Box Office $29,116,320
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,077,088
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,613,628
Total $3,690,716
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Creatively unfulfilled and facing financial ruin, the fictionalized version of Nicolas Cage must accept a $1 million offer to attend the birthday of a super fan. When things take a wildly dangerous turn, Cage is forced to live up to his own legend, channeling his most iconic and beloved on-screen characters in order to save himself and his loved ones. With a career built for this very moment, the Academy Award-winning actor must take on the role of a lifetime; Himself.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$7,131,703 (35.1% of total gross)
Legs:2.85 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:69.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$30,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,036 opening theaters/3,036 max. theaters, 3.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $23,056,966

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 22nd, 2022 (Wide) by Lionsgate
International Releases: April 1st, 2022 (Wide), released as El Peso Del Talento (Nicaragua)
April 20th, 2022 (Wide) (Belgium)
April 20th, 2022 (Wide) (France)
April 20th, 2022 (Wide) (Indonesia)
April 21st, 2022 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: June 7th, 2022 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for language throughout, some sexual references, drug use and violence.
(Rating bulletin 2726 (cert #53321), 4/6/2022)
Cast, crew, or production detail: Fictionalized Version of Yourself, Same Actor, Multiple Roles
Subgenre: Action Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Lionsgate, Burr! Productions, Saturn Films
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Creatively unfulfilled and facing financial ruin, the fictionalized version of Nicolas Cage must accept a $1 million offer to attend the birthday of a super fan. When things take a wildly dangerous turn, Cage is forced to live up to his own legend, channeling his most iconic and beloved on-screen characters in order to save himself and his loved ones. With a career built for this very moment, the Academy Award-winning actor must take on the role of a lifetime; Himself.
